faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in North Bergen?
faqs.answer: North Bergen properties most commonly experience German cockroach and American cockroach infestations. German roaches prefer indoor kitchens and bathrooms, while American roaches often enter from basements, sewers, and outdoor areas. Our technicians identify the species and apply the most effective treatment method for complete elimination.
